snippet: May 3 2022: Borough voted to allow 1 Class 5 Cannabis Retail License. Open application process: zoning permit, planning board approval, then $2000 borough application to Clerk. No deadline posted.

rfp_title: Notice of RFP – Class 5 Cannabis Retail Sales License in Upper Township, New Jersey
column10: The application for the Class 5 Cannabis Retail Sales License is due on June 23, 2026, at 2:00 pm. There is no specified deadline for submitting questions to the township. The RFP is posted on Upper Township's official website.
